---
title: "Data Analysis and Decision Support"
---
::: {.columns .align-items-center}

::: {.column width="65%"}

::: {.callout-note title="About me"}
::: {.hero-text}
PhD candidate in humanities and social sciences transitioning into data analysis
:::
*#data, #analysis, #insight*
:::
:::

::: {.column width="35%"}

![](/images/profile.jpg){.profile-photo}

:::

:::

## Who I Am

Joint PhD candidate (EPHE-PSL / UCLouvain), I develop expertise in the structured analysis of complex data.

My profile stands out through a methodological approach: I do not focus on tools alone, but on building rigorous, interpretable, and decision-oriented analyses.

I am transitioning into data analysis with a central motivation:  
to extract meaning from complex data by identifying relationships, patterns, and underlying structures.

I place particular emphasis on translating these results — through structuring, visualization, and storytelling — to make them immediately understandable and actionable.

---

## What I Can Bring

- Structuring and clarifying complex problems  
- Data cleaning, transformation, and reliability  
- Rigorous analysis grounded in statistical methods  
- Data visualization and storytelling  
- Translating analyses into insights understandable by non-technical stakeholders  
- Bridging the gap between data and teams to support decision-making  

---

## Explore

[Projects](projects.qmd) · [Approach](method.qmd) · [CV](cv.qmd) · [Contact](contact.qmd)
